verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with potential for automation in routine tasks but preservation of creative judgment and human relationships.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: AI can already perform tasks such as color correction, sound design, and editing, which are routine cognitive tasks in filmmaking.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: While AI can generate ideas, it lacks the creative judgment and originality of a human filmmaker, making this task less susceptible to automation.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: The film industry has strict regulations and licensing requirements that protect the rights of filmmakers and preserve the creative process.

evidence_ledger.contribution: Understanding of the film industry's iconic methodology

adjacent_careers.name: Screenwriter
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both filmmakers and screenwriters work together to create a cohesive narrative, but screenwriting is more focused on writing the script

adjacent_careers.name: Editor
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Editing is a critical task in filmmaking that requires human judgment and creativity

recent_developments.headline: AI-powered film editing software gains popularity
recent_developments.impact: This development may lead to increased automation in film editing tasks.

recent_developments.headline: Film industry adopts AI for color correction and sound design
recent_developments.impact: This adoption may lead to increased efficiency in these tasks, but also raises concerns about job displacement.

recent_developments.headline: Generative tools enter mainstream creative pipelines
recent_developments.impact: Studios and agencies use AI for ideation, layout, voice, and music drafts — finals still human-finished.

quotes.quote: I am utterly disgusted. This is an insult to life itself.
quotes.speaker: Hayao Miyazaki
quotes.title: Co-founder, Studio Ghibli

quotes.quote: AI is a tool. It will not replace artists. It will replace artists who do not learn to use AI as a tool.
quotes.speaker: Refik Anadol
quotes.title: Media artist

quotes.quote: Generative tools collapse the cost of producing a draft to near zero. The differentiator becomes taste, judgment, and knowing what is worth making at all.
quotes.speaker: John Maeda
quotes.title: Designer; VP of Design and AI, Microsoft
